element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Shoot bubbles to trap foes and throw them; foundation mechanic from game start
Dig through sand to find treasure; exploration-based resource gathering
Pick up shells to break open treasure chests containing power-ups
Scattered throughout levels; restore health, grant extra lives, increase bubble range/power
Environmental hazards and exploration complexity increase
Volcano hazards and increased enemy difficulty
Two sequential boss battles culminating the adventure

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation with themed stages introducing environmental variety; tension builds toward final boss confrontation at Ursula's Castle

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Sand digging in Coral Sea reveals hidden treasures; exploration-based rewards
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Treasure chests require sea shells as keys; hidden resources discoverable through digging

difficulty_curve.early_game: Coral Sea introduces core mechanics (bubbles, digging, shells) in safe environment; learning phase
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Sunken Ship and Sea of Ice add environmental complexity and moderate enemy pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Undersea Volcano escalates hazards; Ursula's Castle presents two sequential boss battles
notable_spikes: Transition from exploration-focused Coral Sea to hazard-rich Undersea Volcano

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe, expansive exploration zone establishing all core mechanics: bubble combat, sand digging for treasure, shell collection, and power-up gathering. Minimal enemy pressure allows player mastery before difficulty escalation.

Stages 2-4 each feature distinct underwater environments (Sunken Ship, Sea of Ice, Undersea Volcano) introducing thematic hazards while maintaining core gameplay loop of combat, exploration, and resource collection.
Final two stages dedicated to Ursula's Castle housing sequential boss battles; narrative climax matching game's movie adaptation structure.
